name: Acid Splash
description: You fire a small orb of acid at the target. You must succeed on a ranged touch attack to hit your target. The orb deals 1d3 points of acid damage.

name: Create Water
description: This spell generates wholesome, drinkable water, just like clean rain water. Water can be created in an area as small as will actually contain the liquid, or in an area three times as large (up to 2 gallons/level).

name: Cure Minor Wounds
description: Cures 1 point of damage.

name: Dancing Lights
description: Creates up to four lights resembling torches, lanterns, or glowing orbs.

name: Daze
description: This enchantment clouds the mind of a humanoid creature with 4 or fewer Hit Dice, causing it to become dazed.

name: Detect Animals or Plants
description: Detects kinds of animals or plants within a 60-ft. cone.

name: Detect Magic
description: You detect magical auras. The amount of information revealed depends on how long you study a particular area or subject.

name: Detect Undead
description: You can detect the aura that surrounds undead creatures. The amount of information revealed depends on how long you study a particular area or subject.

name: Flare
description: Dazzles one creature, imposing a -1 penalty on attack rolls for 1 minute (Fortitude negates).

name: Ghost Sound
description: Ghost sound allows you to create a volume of sound that rises, recedes, approaches, or remains at a fixed place. You choose what type of sound ghost sound creates when casting it.

name: Guidance
description: This spell imbues the subject with a touch of divine guidance. The creature gets a +1 competence bonus on a single attack roll, saving throw, or skill check.

name: Inflict Minor Wounds
description: When laying your hand upon a creature, you channel negative energy that deals 1 point of damage. Since undead are powered by negative energy, this spell cures such a creature of 1 point of damage.

name: Know Direction
description: You instantly know which direction is north.

name: Light
description: This spell causes a touched object to glow like a torch, shedding bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet.

name: Lullaby
description: Makes subject drowsy; -5 on Listen checks, -2 on Will saves vs sleep.

name: Mage Hand
description: You point your finger at an object and can lift it and move it at will from a distance. The object can weigh no more than 5 pounds.

name: Mending
description: Repairs 1d4 hit points of damage to an object.

name: Message
description: Whisper messages to designated creatures.

name: Open/Close
description: Opens or closes small or light things.

name: Purify Food and Drink
description: This spell makes spoiled, rotten, diseased, or otherwise contaminated food and water pure and suitable for eating and drinking.

name: Ray of Frost
description: A ray of freezing air and ice projects from your pointing finger. You must succeed on a ranged touch attack with the ray to deal 1d3 points of cold damage.

name: Read Magic
description: By means of read magic, you can decipher magical inscriptions on objects—books, scrolls, weapons, and the like—that would otherwise be unintelligible.

name: Resistance
description: You imbue the subject with magical energy that protects it from harm, granting it a +1 resistance bonus on saves.

name: Shillelagh
description: Your club or quarterstaff becomes +1 magical and deals 2d6 damage.

name: Summon Instrument
description: Summons a musical instrument to the caster's hands.

name: Virtue
description: The subject gains 1 temporary hit point.
